assertion_results.text: Step 7 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Case A section shows two tasks (upstream backport and downstream propagation) for rhtpa-2.2. Both specify labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]. Both use jira.create_link with type: "Depend" linking to TC-8020.

assertion_results.text: Step 7 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md confirms rhtpa-2.1 is affected (tokio 1.40.0 < 1.42.0) and JQL search returns no sibling CVE Jira, triggering Step 7 Case B. remediation.md Case B section creates two preemptive remediation tasks for rhtpa-2.1. cross-stream.md confirms 'No sibling CVE Jira exists for stream rhtpa-2.1. Preemptive remediation tasks have been created.'

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md shows both preemptive tasks with labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. cross-stream.md comparison table confirms the same four labels for both preemptive tasks.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md shows both preemptive tasks using jira.create_link with type: "Related" (explicitly headed 'Link (Related, NOT Depend)'). cross-stream.md comparison table confirms Case B uses 'Related' link type vs Case A's 'Depend'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md shows both preemptive task descriptions begin with: '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream.' cross-stream.md also documents this prefix in the 'Description prefix used in preemptive tasks' section.
